hero.badge: Improve accuracy, respond faster, and close winning quotes in minutes.

sectionTitle.title: An All-In-One Platform To Manage Quotes for Construction Projects
sectionTitle.description: BuilderTek Quotes eliminate fragmented pricing workflows. The platform's versatility extends from quote creation, revisions, approvals, and tracking into one unified system.  BuilderTek Quotes ensure pricing accuracy, version control, and complete visibility, without disconnected spreadsheets or email chains.

features.title: Create Quotes with Confidence
features.description: Build detailed quotes using structured line items, pricing rules, and cost data pulled directly from your project.

features.title: Manage Revisions with Control
features.description: Track revisions automatically with clear version history and approval status.

features.title: Send Professional Quotes
features.description: Deliver branded, professional quotes directly from BuilderTek with complete documentation.

features.title: Convert Quotes Seamlessly
features.description: Turn approved quotes into contracts, budgets, or jobs without re-entering data.

section.title: Error-Free and Effort-Free Quotes For Construction Projects
section.subtitle: BuilderTek Quotes brings structure and control to quote creation, approvals, and conversions-all centralized inside BuilderTek Quotes.

features.title: Version-Controlled Quotes
features.description: Every quote revision is automatically tracked, ensuring your team always works from the latest version while maintaining a complete history of changes for reference, compliance, and accountability.

features.title: BuilderTek-Native Pricing Logic
features.description: Leverage BuilderTek's powerful data model to apply consistent pricing rules, cost structures, and project data, reducing manual errors and improving pricing accuracy across all quotes.

features.title: Real-Time Status Tracking
features.description: Instantly see where each quote stands- draft, sent, revised, approved, or awarded, so teams can prioritize follow-ups and respond quickly to opportunities.

features.title: Built-In Approval Workflows
features.description: Route quotes through configurable approval processes before they are shared or finalized. Maintain internal controls while eliminating delays caused by disconnected review cycles.

section.title: Why Construction Companies Choose BuilderTek Quote Management
section.description: It makes quote management faster and smarter!

cards.title: Pricing consistency
cards.description: Follow the same pricing structure, cost logic, and project data from initial estimate through final execution.

cards.title: Reduced approval delays
cards.description: Built-in approval workflows streamline internal reviews and eliminate back-and-forth emails.

cards.title: Improved Decision Accuracy.
cards.description: Standardized quotes make proposal evaluation more efficient for informed decision-making.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.subtitle: Explore Answers to Frequently Asked Questions about BuilderTek.

items.question: Can BuilderTek Quotes be used for both customer and vendor pricing?
items.answer: BuilderTek Quotes has structured line items, native pricing logic, and version control. The system ensures that every quote is built from consistent, accurate data and reduces manual errors and pricing discrepancies throughout the project lifecycle. Yes. BuilderTek Quotes supports both customer-facing and vendor-related pricing, allowing teams to manage multiple quote types while maintaining consistency and control in one centralized system.

items.question: Do my subcontractors and vendors need a BuilderTek account to submit bids?
items.answer: No. Subcontractors and vendors can submit bids securely through email or shared links without needing a full BuilderTek account.

items.question: Can I manage quote revisions and approvals within BuilderTek?
items.answer: Yes. BuilderTek automatically tracks all quote revisions and supports configurable approval workflows, giving teams clear visibility into version history, approval status, and changes made at each stage.

items.question: Do approved quotes integrate with other BuilderTek modules?
items.answer: Absolutely. Approved quotes can be seamlessly converted into contracts, budgets, or jobs within BuilderTek, eliminating duplicate data entry and maintaining continuity across project workflows.

items.question: Is BuilderTek Quotes suitable for both residential and commercial projects?
items.answer: Yes. BuilderTek Quotes is designed to scale across residential, commercial, and mixed-use projects, providing the same structured, auditable quote management process regardless of project size or complexity.
